headline: Heinz kicks off NFL deal by inducting 57th draft pick into new club
summary: The league’s first global condiment partner will plaster its hometown of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania — the location of the 2026 draft — with OOH ads.

content.title: Heinz kicks off NFL deal by inducting 57th draft pick into new club
content.summary: The league’s first global condiment partner will plaster its hometown of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania — the location of the 2026 draft — with OOH ads.

headline: Capri Sun Unveils ‘Hydrate,’ One of the First-to-Market Drinks with Electrolytes Designed Just for Kids
summary: CHICAGO, April 21, 2026--Capri Sun, the iconic brand that helps unleash peak kid with every poke, is expanding its portfolio with Capri Sun Hydrate – one of the first-to-market drinks with electrolytes designed specifically for kids. Rolling out to major retailers nationwide, Capri Sun Hydrate delivers an essential blend of electrolytes and Vitamin E, with 50 percent less sugar than the leading regular sports drinks* and no artificial flavors, colors or preservatives. headline: HEINZ Turns the 57th Pick Into "Mr. 57" at This Year’s NFL Draft
summary: PITTSBURGH & CHICAGO, April 21, 2026--This NFL Draft, HEINZ is putting its most iconic number on the clock. As one of the most anticipated moments in football, HEINZ is kicking it off with a new Draft day tradition in its hometown of Pittsburgh. Paying homage to the longstanding, iconic "57" gracing its bottles for 157 years and counting, HEINZ is turning the 57th pick into a moment of its own.
